code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Safety hazards or total product failure regardless of initial satisfaction
    - Multiple defects/replacements ("bought twice, broke both times")
    - Explicit "don't buy" recommendations with evidence of failure
    - Negative updates that override positive initial impressions

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Core functionality failures despite partial usability
    - Significant quality issues impacting primary use ("leaks constantly")
    - Regret language ("waste of money") with demonstrated flaws
    - Comparative inferiority to alternatives ("worse than my old one")

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons requiring contextual use ("good for light use")
    - Conditional praise without recommendation ("works if you...")
    - Technical adequacy with notable compromises ("does the job BUT...")

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Explicit star deduction for SINGLE functional issue ("only reason not 5")
    - Maintained recommendation despite clear usability drawbacks
    - Resolved issues with lingering mention ("had smell but washed out")
    - Brief positive statements lacking enthusiasm ("they work fine")

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Meets all key needs reliably without major flaws
    - Practical benefits outweigh stated limitations ("still 5 stars for...")
    - Non-functional criticisms with enthusiastic core praise ("wrinkles but absorbs best")
    - Long-term validation confirming sustained performance ("still perfect after 1 year")
    - Multi-feature praise (functionality + design + durability)

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Would be 5 stars but [functional issue]" →4
    - "Still 5 stars despite [non-functional quirk]" →5
    - Brief functional praise without criticism →5 ("Fits perfectly")
    - Resolved functional prerequisites →4 ("needs 2 washes first")
    - Enthusiastic recommendation overrides minor issues →5
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (5-Star Core):
Review: If there's anything you want in a trash can, this has it! Silent, durable, space-saving.
<Reasoning>Multi-feature praise without functional criticisms. Clear enthusiastic endorsement.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 2 (4-Star Fix):
Review: The towels require 2 washes for full absorbency but work well after.
<Reasoning>Functional prerequisite mentioned as lingering drawback despite resolution.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 3 (5-Star Update):
Review: EDIT: After 1 year still perfect! Occasional noise doesn't affect results.
<Reasoning>Long-term validation with trivial non-functional drawback.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 4 (Gold 4):
Review: Love the design but fabric sags when full. Perfect for lightweight items.
<Reasoning>Clear recommendation with functional capacity limitation.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5 (1-Star Critical):
Review: UPDATE: Failed twice within 6 months - dangerous defects!
<Reasoning>Multiple safety failures override any positives.</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 6 (5-Star Practical):
Review: Cotton wrinkles but absorbs better than competitors. Worth every penny!
<Reasoning>Core functionality praise outweighs material characteristic.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7 (3-Star Balance):
Review: Gets job done with frequent adjustments. Okay for the price.
<Reasoning>Technical adequacy with usability compromises.</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 8 (2-Star Regret):
Review: Beautiful but cracks under normal use. Wouldn't recommend.
<Reasoning>Core failure despite aesthetic appeal.</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 9 (4-Star Imperfect):
Review: These bins organize well but lack exceptional quality. You could do worse.
<Reasoning>Functional adequacy without enthusiasm. Faint praise warrants 4.</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 10 (5-Star Concise):
Review: Fit perfect into my CHV1210. Exactly what I needed!
<Reasoning>Definitive functional praise without negatives.</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>
</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (29 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I really like these potholders. They look great and do a good job of keeping hot pots and pans and other dishes out of the oven off the table and counters. They had a bit of a plastic smell when they arrived but after I washed them (they held up fine..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I like this towel. It is 100% Turkish cotton and measures 27 inches by 55 inches. The dobby weave is somewhat intricate so you are going to get some good absorbency. This towel also comes in a bath sheet, which is competively priced with the local st..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This looks like a great idea and easy to use, but actually it's very awkward. The idea is to hang your jewelry in the closet. But the hanger part doesn't swivel, so if you want to select an item, you have to remove it from the closet and lay it on th..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "These skull and bones are plenty big to be seen from a distance. You get two in the package and they measure 21"x18.5". You could use them in your home or office. Even though these are the pirate skull and bones, they are smiling and don't look scary..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "These mats are fine if you like to switch them out a lot. If you refer to have a very fresh and new bathmat for the bathroom when guests are staying for a visit, then these have a fun knobbly like texture to them and are cheap enough to pick up for s..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [3, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "This is a good, though not extra ordinary storage bin. It lacks exceptional build quality, exceptional attention to detail, or anything that's all that remarkable. It looks good, and the pattern is timeless, plus it keeps stuff together. You could do..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "Very nice set of skillets - and what a lovely color.  Quite a bargain, and I was glad to find it as I provide my husband his "own" skillets.  He tends to be a "high heat" cook, and so I don't let him use my expensive skillets.  Was nice to find Farbe..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "The towels are definitely cute and well made. Very attractive. The only reason Im not giving them five stars is because they aren't very absorbent. Out of the package they aren't really absorbent at all. Throw them in the wash with some fabric soften..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 29 errors, 22 borderline out of 80 examples."}
